claims.claim: @googleworkspace/cli (gws) latest version is 0.22.5, published March 31, 2026.
claims.note: SKILL.md and SKILL_HE.md text says '0.22.x' which remains accurate.

claims.claim: gws gmail helper commands: +send, +triage, +watch, +reply, +reply-all, +forward, +read; all support --draft (v0.22.0) and -a/--attach (v0.18.0).
claims.note: Added the reply/reply-all/forward/read helpers to references/gws-gmail-commands.md.

claims.claim: Consumer Gmail (@gmail.com) caps daily sending at 500 recipients per day on a rolling 24h window. (Previously the skill said 100/day; corrected to 500/day.)
claims.note: Critical bug fix in SKILL.md, SKILL_HE.md, and references/gws-gmail-commands.md.

claims.claim: Google Workspace caps daily sending at 2,000 recipients/day via the Gmail API, and 10,000 recipients/day via SMTP relay (when enabled in Admin Console).

Gmail API per-user-per-minute quota is 6,000 units (May 2026 quota refresh). messages.modify=5 units, messages.send=100 units, messages.list=5 units, labels.create=5 units, settings.filters.create=5 units. Daily project quota 80,000,000 units.
Gmail API usage limits were updated on May 1, 2026. Projects active between Nov 2025-Apr 2026 retain previous quotas; new projects from May 1, 2026 are on the new quotas.
Israeli VAT rate is 18% from 1 Jan 2025 (raised from 17%). The 2026 Budget Law approved by the Knesset on 5 December 2025 kept VAT at 18% (rolled back a proposed 19% increase).

Israel's Communications Law (Broadcasting and Telecommunications), 5742-1982, Section 30A imposes statutory damages of up to 1,000 NIS per spam message, awarded without proof of harm. Damages are cumulative.
Criminal fine for knowing violation of Section 30A is up to 226,000 NIS as of 2026 (indexed annually; was 202,000 NIS in prior years).

Marketing emails under Section 30A must (a) carry the word 'פרסומת' at the start of the subject, (b) include the sender's full name and street address, (c) provide a clear opt-out mechanism, (d) have prior explicit written consent.
Section 30A exempts messages to an existing customer about same-kind products/services within 6 months of purchase; an opt-out path is still required.

Gmail's bulk-sender requirements took effect February 2024: senders of >5,000 messages/day to Gmail must set up SPF + DKIM + DMARC + RFC 8058 one-click unsubscribe, with spam complaint rate below 0.1% (red line 0.3%).
Starting November 2025, Gmail ramped enforcement of the bulk-sender rules: non-compliant traffic faces temporary and permanent rejections.

To satisfy Gmail's one-click unsubscribe, senders must add BOTH List-Unsubscribe (with https URL and mailto) AND List-Unsubscribe-Post: List-Unsubscribe=One-Click headers (RFC 8058). mailto or URL alone does not satisfy.

Gmail and Outlook strip dir="rtl" from <body>/<html> tags. Reliable RTL in HTML emails requires inline style="direction:rtl; text-align:right" on each block element. Apple Mail and Yahoo honor dir="rtl".

Hebcal Jewish Calendar REST API is free under CC-BY, no API key required. Rate limit: 90 requests per 10-second window. Use i=on parameter for Israeli observance (single-day yom tov for Pesach/Sukkot).
Google Workspace pricing in Israel: Business Starter ~25 NIS/user/month, Business Standard ~50 NIS/user/month; VAT added at checkout.
claims.note: Informational only, not used directly in SKILL.md; reference for users sizing the cost.

claims.claim: Google Apps Script Rhino runtime is deprecated since Feb 20, 2025 and retiring on Jan 31, 2026; all scripts must migrate to V8.
claims.note: Not directly cited in SKILL.md because this skill uses the gws CLI, not Apps Script. Mentioned here so a future Apps-Script-based v2 of the skill knows the deadline.

claims.claim: Google Workspace standard data-region selector offers United States or European Union only; Israel is not a standalone option. Customers needing Israel data residency must use Google Cloud's me-west1 (Tel Aviv) region via Assured Workloads. The Israeli government (Project Nimbus) rolled out Workspace across ministries in January 2026.
claims.note: Informational. Not surfaced in SKILL.md (out of scope for freelancer email automation) but relevant if the skill is expanded for regulated industries.

claims.claim: @googleworkspace/cli (gws) is a community Rust binary distributed via npm. It is not an officially supported Google product; users must provide their own Google Cloud project and OAuth client. Tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and auto-refreshed.
